# Codex Footprint Fixtures

These fixtures mimic observed Codex CLI artifacts from `~/.codex`.
Any usernames and project paths in the sample JSONL files are intentionally anonymized.

Included:

- `sessions/2026/03/05/rollout-modern.jsonl` (modern `session_meta` format)
- `sessions/2025/08/24/rollout-legacy.jsonl` (legacy format)
- `history.jsonl` (global prompt history)
- `archived_sessions/rollout-archived.jsonl` (archived modern session sample)
